Media Object
Media Object base API
Data Fields
_media Struct Reference

Media C API handle providing the public and private virtual interface.

#include <media.h>

Data Fields

void(* get_version )(const struct _media *self, uint32_t *major, uint32_t *minor, uint32_t *patch)
 Get the version of the implementated media API.
 
int(* get_streams )(const struct _media *self, const streams_t **streams)
 Get the list of available streams for a given instance.
 
int(* get_controls )(const struct _media *self, const controls_t **controls)
 Get the list of available controls for a given instance.
 
int(* about )(const struct _media *self, const properties_t **properties)
 Get the value of a control by its ID.
 
int(* query_stream_capabilities )(const struct _media *self, const char *name, capabilities_t **caps)
 Determine the compatible capabilities of a stream in the current configuration context.
 
media_error_t(* get_last_error )(const struct _media *self)
 Get the error information of the media instance.
 
int(* do_initialize )(const struct _media *self)
 Initialize the private context of the handle.
 
int(* do_release )(const struct _media *self)
 Release the private context of the handle.
 
int(* do_prepare )(const struct _media *self)
 Prepare the media instance for processing.
 
int(* do_finalize )(const struct _media *self)
 Finalize the media instance after processing.
 
int(* do_get_control )(const struct _media *self, const char *const name, value_t *value)
 Get the value of a control by its name.
 
int(* do_set_control )(const struct _media *self, const char *name, const value_t value)
 Set the value of a control by its name.
 
int(* do_get_stream_capabilities )(const struct _media *self, const char *const name, const capabilities_t **caps)
 Get the capabilities of a given stream.
 
int(* do_set_stream_capabilities )(const struct _media *self, const char *const name, const capabilities_t *caps)
 Set the desired capabilities of a given stream.
 
int(* do_query_memory_allocation )(const struct _media *self, const char *const name, properties_t **constraints)
 Query memory allocation constraints for input buffers.
 
int(* set_state )(const struct _media *self, media_state_t state)
 Set the current state of the media instance.
 
media_state_t state
 
media_state_transition_t state_transition

int(* _media::about) (const struct _media *self, const properties_t **properties)
Parameters
[in]selfInstance of the media handle
[in]idID of the control
[out]valueValue of the control

◆ do_finalize

int(* _media::do_finalize) (const struct _media *self)
Note
This is a private member and should not be called directly by users. It is used internally by the public API.

[out]valueValue of the control

int(* _media::do_get_stream_capabilities) (const struct _media *self, const char *const name, const capabilities_t **caps)
Parameters
[in]selfInstance of the media handle
[in]nameName of the stream
[out]capsList of capabilities
Note
caps is a NULL-terminated array

int(* _media::do_initialize) (const struct _media *self)
Note
This is a private member and should not be called directly by users. It is used internally by the public API.

int(* _media::do_prepare) (const struct _media *self)
Note
This is a private member and should not be called directly by users. It is used internally by the public API.

[in]nameName of the stream
[out]constraintsMemory allocation constraints as properties
Note
This is a private member and should not be called directly by users. It is used internally by the public API.

int(* _media::do_release) (const struct _media *self)
Note
This is a private member and should not be called directly by users. It is used internally by the public API.

◆ get_last_error

media_error_t(* _media::get_last_error) (const struct _media *self)
Note
This is a private member and should not be called directly by users. It is used internally by the public API to retrieve error details.

◆ get_streams

int(* _media::get_streams) (const struct _media *self, const streams_t **streams)
Parameters
[in]selfInstance of the media handle
[out]streamsList of streams. Ownership is not transferred to the caller (const)
Note
streams is a NULL-terminated array

◆ get_version

void(* _media::get_version) (const struct _media *self, uint32_t *major, uint32_t *minor, uint32_t *patch)
Parameters
[in]selfInstance of the media handle
[out]major
[out]minor
[out]patch

◆ query_stream_capabilities

int(* _media::query_stream_capabilities) (const struct _media *self, const char *name, capabilities_t **caps)

This method queries the capabilities of the specified stream, taking into account the current configuration and dependencies between streams. For input streams, it lists all available capabilities. For output streams, it returns only the capabilities compatible with the current configuration of its dependent input streams.

Note
This function is stateless and can be called at any time.
Parameters
[in]selfInstance of the media handle
[in]nameThe name of the stream whose compatible capabilities are to be determined
[out]capsPointer to receive the stream capabilities
Returns
int Error code indicating the success or failure of the operation. Returns MEDIA_ERROR_NONE on success.

◆ set_state

int(* _media::set_state) (const struct _media *self, media_state_t state)
Note
This is a private member and should not be called directly by users. It is used internally by the public API to update the state.

◆ state

media_state_t _media::state

Current state of the media instance.

◆ state_transition

media_state_transition_t _media::state_transition

Current state transition of the media instance.
